_comment: Copy to browser_sites.json (cwd) or point $HUMANIZE_BROWSER_SITES at this file, then: untell-verify --browser <name>. Selectors captured live 2026-06-25 (see docs/free-detector-probes.md). zerogpt is already built-in; the others are templates with known caveats.

decopy._caveat: Clean input + no signup, but a WEAK detector (scored clearly-AI text 0% AI) and slow (~10s). Result selector is approximate.

detecting-ai._caveat: Real detector (scored AI text 97.3%), submit is an <a> (handled). FRAGILE: result is an SVG gauge with utility-class selectors that swap the input out after detection; verify live before trusting. ZeroGPT is the reliable built-in.
